response.justification: The candidate is a strong and versatile senior web/full-stack engineer, but his profile does not match this embedded networking security role. He lacks the required native-level Japanese, has no demonstrated experience with Linux kernel investigation or modification, no L2/L3 networking or switch development background, and no security-technology experience (MACsec, 802.1X, authentication systems). His C/UNIX exposure is brief and dated (a six-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015), while his recent decade of work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web platforms.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career (15+ years) spanning web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded-adjacent work
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, and open-source contributions
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems (DLang async I/O at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency, which is a hard requirement for this role
No experience with L2/L3 networking, switch products, or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X
Minimal and outdated C/UNIX experience, with no Linux kernel analysis or modification background

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking or security domain experience
Solid general engineering seniority and systems experience
